definition: optical spectrometer operating in the UV and/or visible and/or IR spectral region that uses a broadband light source, dispersive elements and a diode array detector to measure the concentration of specific components

definition_ml.en: optical spectrometer operating in the UV and/or visible and/or IR spectral region that uses a broadband light source, dispersive elements and a diode array detector to measure the concentration of specific components
definition_ml.de: Optisches Spektrometer, das im UV- und/oder sichtbaren und/oder IR-Spektralbereich arbeitet und eine breitbandige Lichtquelle, dispersive Elemente und einen Diodenarray-Detektor zur Messung der Konzentration bestimmter Komponenten verwendet

remark: also used by Process Automation - Device Information Model (PA-DIM)

remark_ml.en: also used by Process Automation - Device Information Model (PA-DIM)
